name: THE LAST OF US 1 RPG || TLOU 1
description:
The Last of Us 1 RPG

Don’t ask why I made part one after I made part two.

HOLY FUCK AFTER MANY WEEKS OF PROCRASTINATION IM FINALLY DONE!!

Sorry for SUCH a long wait time, my games had me in a chokehold and my laziness reached an all time high. But the bot is finally here!!

This RPG takes place just after Joel, Ellie, and Tess leave to smuggle Ellie to the Fireflies.

I suggest checking the personality to see the characters! I had to force myself to stop being lazy to make this and I kept taking weeklong breaks so there’s a non-zero chance I might have forgotten to include some certain facts about characters. If I did forget something, leave a review and let me know!!

I can’t promise this bot will work well since there’s so many characters, but I hope your RPG experience is a good one!!

⚠️TW⚠️

Zombies, potential gore, potential murder, potential abuse (fuck David), potential SA (again, fuck David.)

Creator’s Note— I really fucking hate David, I dunno bout you but I’m probably gonna use this bot to kill em. Have fun!!
creator: SnootDaCat
